title: Rafael's Useful Cactus
description: A mod that makes cacti more useful by allowing you to harvest cactus skin, craft various tools and armor from it and use it as wood!
body:
# Rafael's Useful Cactus Mod

Transform cactus into resources for tools, armor, and building!

Rafael's Useful Cactus Mod overhauls the cactus, giving it a whole new purpose in Minecraft. From crafting tools and armor to introducing new type of blocks materials, this mod adds exciting new features and desert-specific bonuses that enhance gameplay for adventurers and builders alike.

## 🌵 Key Features
- **Stripped Cactus Blocks**: Right-click a cactus to strip its skin.
- **Cactus Skin**: Harvested from stripped cactus, this new item is used to craft tools and armor.
- **Cactus Tools & Trimmable Armor**: Craft unique tools and armor with special effects and desert-specific bonuses.
- **Desert Buffs**: Gain exclusive bonuses for using cactus tools and armor in desert biomes.

## Cactus Tools and Their Benefits

| Tool           | Damage | Speed | Special Effect                                              | Desert Bonus               |
|----------------|--------|-------|-------------------------------------------------------------|----------------------------|
| Cactus Sword   | 4.0    | 1.6   | 20% chance to apply Desert Thorn, +1 damage in day, +2 at noon | +1.5 damage on sand         |
| Cactus Hammer  | 6.0    | 0.8   | 3x3 mining area, knocks targets upward                      | 25% mining speed boost     |
| Cactus Axe     | 7.0    | 0.9   | None                                                        | None                       |
| Cactus Pickaxe | 4.0    | 1.2   | Fortune bonus at noon                                       | 20% durability preservation |
| Cactus Shovel  | 3.0    | 1.5   | None                                                        | None                       |
| Cactus Hoe     | 2.0    | 2.0   | None                                                        | None                       |

## Cactus Armor Bonuses

| Armor Piece | Protection Value | Durability | Effect | Desert Bonus |
|-------------|-----------------|------------|---------|--------------|
| Cactus Helmet | 4 | 500 | Moderate protection | Part of set bonus |
| Cactus Chestplate | 6 | 500 | High protection | Part of set bonus |
| Cactus Leggings | 2 | 500 | Light protection | Part of set bonus |
| Cactus Boots | 2 | 500 | Light protection | Part of set bonus |
| Full Set | 14 total | - | Thorns effect | Speed boost, durability preservation |


## 🌎 Localization
Help us make the mod available in more languages [here](https://crowdin.com/project/rafaels-useful-cactus)! 

## Supported Versions
- **Fabric**
  - 1.21
  - 1.21.1
  - 1.21.2
  - 1.21.3


**Supported Languages**: English, Azerbaijani, Italian, German, French,  Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portugese, Russian, Turkish,  Chinese Simplified
